title: PS - Graph Algorithms
description: Problem set rubric template for graph algorithm questions (BFS, DFS, shortest paths, MSTs).

criteria.title: Algorithm Description
criteria.description: Student describes a correct graph algorithm (e.g., BFS/DFS/Dijkstra/Prim/Kruskal).

levels.title: Complete
levels.description: Correct algorithm with clear step-by-step description.

levels.title: Substantial
levels.description: Mostly correct with minor errors or omissions.

criteria.title: Runtime Analysis
criteria.description: Student derives the time and/or space complexity using graph parameters (V, E).

levels.title: Complete
levels.description: Correct complexity in terms of V and E with justification.

levels.title: Partial
levels.description: Partially correct or minor error in justification.

criteria.title: Correctness Argument
criteria.description: Student argues or proves the algorithm is correct (e.g., loop invariant, induction on BFS layers).

criteria.title: Algorithm Trace
criteria.description: Student traces the algorithm execution on a given example graph.

levels.title: Complete
levels.description: Correct and complete trace showing intermediate states.

levels.title: Partial
levels.description: Mostly correct trace with minor errors.
